edges.expression: CASE WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 4 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 4 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 4 THEN '高价值客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '重要保持客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND (rfm_scored.f_score < 3 OR rfm_scored.m_score < 3) THEN '重要发展客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '重要挽留客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score < 3 THEN '流失预警客户' WHEN rfm_scored.f_score <= 2 AND rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '新晋优质客户' ELSE '一般价值客户' END AS customer_segment

CASE WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 4 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 4 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 4 THEN '高价值客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '重要保持客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND (rfm_scored.f_score < 3 OR rfm_scored.m_score < 3) THEN '重要发展客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '重要挽留客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score < 3 THEN '流失预警客户' WHEN rfm_scored.f_score <= 2 AND rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '新晋优质客户' ELSE '一般价值客户' END AS customer_segment

CASE WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 4 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 4 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 4 THEN '高价值客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '重要保持客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND (rfm_scored.f_score < 3 OR rfm_scored.m_score < 3) THEN '重要发展客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '重要挽留客户' WHEN rfm_scored.r_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.f_score < 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score < 3 THEN '流失预警客户' WHEN rfm_scored.f_score <= 2 AND rfm_scored.r_score >= 3 AND rfm_scored.m_score >= 3 THEN '新晋优质客户' ELSE '一般价值客户' END AS customer_segment

CASE WHEN sv.daily_sales_velocity > 0 AND inv.quantity > 0 THEN ROUND(inv.quantity / sv.daily_sales_velocity, 1) WHEN sv.daily_sales_velocity IS NULL OR sv.daily_sales_velocity = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 0 END AS days_of_stock_remaining

CASE WHEN sv.daily_sales_velocity > 0 AND inv.quantity > 0 THEN ROUND(inv.quantity / sv.daily_sales_velocity, 1) WHEN sv.daily_sales_velocity IS NULL OR sv.daily_sales_velocity = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 0 END AS days_of_stock_remaining
CASE WHEN inv.quantity <= 0 THEN '严重' WHEN inv.quantity <= inv.safety_stock * 0.5 THEN '预警' WHEN inv.quantity <= inv.safety_stock THEN '关注' ELSE '正常' END AS alert_level
CASE WHEN inv.quantity <= 0 THEN '严重' WHEN inv.quantity <= inv.safety_stock * 0.5 THEN '预警' WHEN inv.quantity <= inv.safety_stock THEN '关注' ELSE '正常' END AS alert_level
RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY psd.stat_date ORDER BY psd.sale_amount DESC) AS rank_num
RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY psd.stat_date ORDER BY psd.sale_amount DESC) AS rank_num
CONCAT('商品#', CAST(ads_product_topn_daily.product_id AS STRING)) AS product_name
CASE WHEN pe.sale_amount > 0 THEN ROUND(pe.discount_amount / pe.sale_amount * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS avg_discount_rate
CASE WHEN pe.sale_amount > 0 THEN ROUND(pe.discount_amount / pe.sale_amount * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS avg_discount_rate
CASE WHEN pe.discount_amount > 0 THEN ROUND(pe.sale_amount / pe.discount_amount, 2) ELSE NULL END AS roi
CASE WHEN pe.discount_amount > 0 THEN ROUND(pe.sale_amount / pe.discount_amount, 2) ELSE NULL END AS roi
CONCAT('促销活动-', ads_promotion_roi.promotion_id) AS promotion_name

ROUND((daily_base.total_orders - LAG(daily_base.total_orders, 1, NULL) OVER (ORDER BY daily_base.stat_date)) / NULLIF(LAG(daily_base.total_orders, 1, NULL) OVER (ORDER BY daily_base.stat_date), 0) * 100, 2) AS order_growth_rate

ROUND((daily_base.total_orders - LAG(daily_base.total_orders, 1, NULL) OVER (ORDER BY daily_base.stat_date)) / NULLIF(LAG(daily_base.total_orders, 1, NULL) OVER (ORDER BY daily_base.stat_date), 0) * 100, 2) AS order_growth_rate

ROUND((daily_base.total_amount - LAG(daily_base.total_amount, 1, NULL) OVER (ORDER BY daily_base.stat_date)) / NULLIF(LAG(daily_base.total_amount, 1, NULL) OVER (ORDER BY daily_base.stat_date), 0) * 100, 2) AS amount_growth_rate

ROUND((daily_base.total_amount - LAG(daily_base.total_amount, 1, NULL) OVER (ORDER BY daily_base.stat_date)) / NULLIF(LAG(daily_base.total_amount, 1, NULL) OVER (ORDER BY daily_base.stat_date), 0) * 100, 2) AS amount_growth_rate

ROUND(store_monthly.total_orders / NULLIF(MAX(store_monthly.total_orders) OVER (PARTITION BY store_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 30 + store_monthly.total_amount / NULLIF(MAX(store_monthly.total_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY store_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 40 + store_monthly.customer_count / NULLIF(MAX(store_monthly.customer_count) OVER (PARTITION BY store_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 30, 2) AS performance_score

ROUND(store_monthly.total_orders / NULLIF(MAX(store_monthly.total_orders) OVER (PARTITION BY store_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 30 + store_monthly.total_amount / NULLIF(MAX(store_monthly.total_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY store_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 40 + store_monthly.customer_count / NULLIF(MAX(store_monthly.customer_count) OVER (PARTITION BY store_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 30, 2) AS performance_score

ROUND(store_monthly.total_orders / NULLIF(MAX(store_monthly.total_orders) OVER (PARTITION BY store_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 30 + store_monthly.total_amount / NULLIF(MAX(store_monthly.total_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY store_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 40 + store_monthly.customer_count / NULLIF(MAX(store_monthly.customer_count) OVER (PARTITION BY store_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 30, 2) AS performance_score

ROUND(store_monthly.total_orders / NULLIF(MAX(store_monthly.total_orders) OVER (PARTITION BY store_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 30 + store_monthly.total_amount / NULLIF(MAX(store_monthly.total_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY store_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 40 + store_monthly.customer_count / NULLIF(MAX(store_monthly.customer_count) OVER (PARTITION BY store_monthly.stat_month), 0) * 30, 2) AS performance_score
CASE WHEN t.age < 30 THEN '青年' WHEN t.age < 45 THEN '中年' WHEN t.age < 60 THEN '中老年' ELSE '老年' END AS age_group

COALESCE(CASE WHEN t.city = '北京' THEN '北京' WHEN t.city = '上海' THEN '上海' WHEN t.city IN ('广州', '深圳') THEN '广东' WHEN t.city = '成都' THEN '四川' WHEN t.city = '杭州' THEN '浙江' WHEN t.city = '重庆' THEN '重庆' WHEN t.city = '南京' THEN '江苏' WHEN t.city = '济南' THEN '山东' WHEN t.city = '天津' THEN '天津' END, t.province) AS province

COALESCE(CASE WHEN t.city = '北京' THEN '北京' WHEN t.city = '上海' THEN '上海' WHEN t.city IN ('广州', '深圳') THEN '广东' WHEN t.city = '成都' THEN '四川' WHEN t.city = '杭州' THEN '浙江' WHEN t.city = '重庆' THEN '重庆' WHEN t.city = '南京' THEN '江苏' WHEN t.city = '济南' THEN '山东' WHEN t.city = '天津' THEN '天津' END, t.province) AS province
CASE WHEN t.quantity <= 0 THEN '缺货' WHEN t.quantity <= t.safety_stock * 0.5 THEN '缺货预警' WHEN t.quantity <= t.safety_stock THEN '偏低' ELSE '正常' END AS stock_status
CASE WHEN t.quantity <= 0 THEN '缺货' WHEN t.quantity <= t.safety_stock * 0.5 THEN '缺货预警' WHEN t.quantity <= t.safety_stock THEN '偏低' ELSE '正常' END AS stock_status
DATEDIFF(CAST(@etl_date AS DATE), t.last_restock_date) AS days_since_restock
COALESCE(NULLIF(p.brand, ''), CONCAT('通用-', COALESCE(c.category_name, '未分类'))) AS brand
COALESCE(NULLIF(p.brand, ''), CONCAT('通用-', COALESCE(c.category_name, '未分类'))) AS brand
CASE WHEN CAST(@etl_date AS DATE) BETWEEN t.start_date AND t.end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_active
CASE WHEN CAST(@etl_date AS DATE) BETWEEN t.start_date AND t.end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_active
COALESCE(NULLIF(t.store_type, ''), CASE WHEN t.area_size >= 3000 THEN '旗舰店' WHEN t.area_size >= 1000 THEN '标准店' ELSE '社区店' END) AS store_type
COALESCE(NULLIF(t.store_type, ''), CASE WHEN t.area_size >= 3000 THEN '旗舰店' WHEN t.area_size >= 1000 THEN '标准店' ELSE '社区店' END) AS store_type
CASE WHEN t.area_size >= 3000 THEN 'A级' WHEN t.area_size >= 1000 THEN 'B级' ELSE 'C级' END AS store_level
COALESCE(CASE WHEN t.city = '北京' THEN '北京' WHEN t.city = '上海' THEN '上海' WHEN t.city IN ('广州', '深圳') THEN '广东' WHEN t.city = '成都' THEN '四川' WHEN t.city = '杭州' THEN '浙江' END, t.province) AS province
COALESCE(CASE WHEN t.city = '北京' THEN '北京' WHEN t.city = '上海' THEN '上海' WHEN t.city IN ('广州', '深圳') THEN '广东' WHEN t.city = '成都' THEN '四川' WHEN t.city = '杭州' THEN '浙江' END, t.province) AS province

CASE WHEN SUM(dwd_inventory.quantity) <= 0 THEN '缺货' WHEN SUM(dwd_inventory.quantity) <= MAX(dwd_inventory.safety_stock) * 0.5 THEN '缺货预警' WHEN SUM(dwd_inventory.quantity) <= MAX(dwd_inventory.safety_stock) THEN '偏低' ELSE '正常' END AS stock_status

CASE WHEN SUM(dwd_inventory.quantity) <= 0 THEN '缺货' WHEN SUM(dwd_inventory.quantity) <= MAX(dwd_inventory.safety_stock) * 0.5 THEN '缺货预警' WHEN SUM(dwd_inventory.quantity) <= MAX(dwd_inventory.safety_stock) THEN '偏低' ELSE '正常' END AS stock_status
CONCAT('促销活动-', dws_promotion_effect_daily.promotion_id) AS promotion_name
